overview_client_raw: Surroundings Group is a premium creative agency specializing in high-end real estate, lifestyle, marine, and hospitality content. The agency operates at the intersection of design, storytelling, and strategy—helping developers, builders, architects, property managers, and luxury lifestyle brands elevate their digital presence through world-class visuals and structured, measurable marketing execution.
overview_polished: Surroundings Group is a premium creative agency specializing in high-end real estate, lifestyle, marine, and hospitality content. The agency operates at the intersection of design, storytelling, and strategy—helping developers, builders, architects, property managers, and luxury lifestyle brands elevate their digital presence through world-class visuals and structured, measurable marketing execution.
audience_type: 1. Client Audience (Who We Serve): High-value projects needing premium visuals and consistent marketing. Multi-Family Communities / Property Managers, Luxury Real Estate Agents & Brokerages, Architecture / Interior Design Firms, Marine, Aviation, and Lifestyle Brands, Hospitality & Event Brands. 2. Social Audience (Who Follows & Engages With SG Online): Creatives & Content Professionals, Real Estate Professionals, Builders, Designers, and Trades, Luxury Lifestyle Enthusiasts, Aspiring Creators / Students, Community Members & Local Followers

overview_client_raw: Zen Motorsports is a luxury car dealership and customization shop based in the Tampa Bay area, offering high-end pre-owned vehicles and aftermarket services like detailing, wraps, tint, and performance upgrades.
overview_polished: Zen Motorsports is a luxury car dealership and customization shop based in the Tampa Bay area, offering high-end pre-owned vehicles and aftermarket services like detailing, wraps, tint, and performance upgrades.
audience_type: Business owners / High-Earners

overview_client_raw: Blackfin Boats is a family-owned, independent U.S. boatbuilder rooted in a legacy dating back to 1973. They specialize in high-end offshore fishing and leisure boats, crafted in their Florida facility using yacht-level engineering and materials like carbon-fiber hulls and advanced grid systems. Renowned for durability and innovation, Blackfin delivers rugged, feature-rich vessels backed by strong warranties and industry-leading customer satisfaction.
overview_polished: Blackfin Boats is a family-owned, independent U.S. boatbuilder rooted in a legacy dating back to 1973. They specialize in high-end offshore fishing and leisure boats, crafted in their Florida facility using yacht-level engineering and materials like carbon-fiber hulls and advanced grid systems. Renowned for durability and innovation, Blackfin delivers rugged, feature-rich vessels backed by strong warranties and industry-leading customer satisfaction.
audience_type: NA

overview_client_raw: Monterey Boats is a family-owned, Florida-based builder of premium sport and performance boats since the mid-1980s. They offer multiple model lines — including Elite, Super Sports, M Series, Outboard, and Sport Boats — tailored for speed, luxury, watersports and versatile cruising. Their headquarters and manufacturing facilities are in Williston, Florida, with strong emphasis on modern design, craftsmanship, customer satisfaction, and warranty protection.
overview_polished: Monterey Boats is a family-owned, Florida-based builder of premium sport and performance boats since the mid-1980s. They offer multiple model lines — including Elite, Super Sports, M Series, Outboard, and Sport Boats — tailored for speed, luxury, watersports and versatile cruising. Their headquarters and manufacturing facilities are in Williston, Florida, with strong emphasis on modern design, craftsmanship, customer satisfaction, and warranty protection.
audience_type: Entry level family boat owners
coloring_tone: Naturally enhanced (Make sure colors on boats are accurate)
music_notes: Unparalleled quality and construction, cutting edge craftsmanship and technology, cruising boats, deck boats, outboard and inboard

overview_client_raw: NOVEL Independence Park in Tampa's Westshore District is a refined, 277-unit luxury apartment community offering studios through three-bedroom homes. Residences feature upscale tech-friendly interiors—keyless entry, 1 GB internet, quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, walk-in closets, and spa-style baths. Community perks include a saltwater pool with cabanas, fitness center, coworking spaces, pickleball court, dog park, fire pit, nature trail, and sky deck—all steps from shopping, dining, and Tampa International Airport
overview_polished: NOVEL Independence Park in Tampa's Westshore District is a refined, 277-unit luxury apartment community offering studios through three-bedroom homes. Residences feature upscale tech-friendly interiors—keyless entry, 1 GB internet, quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, walk-in closets, and spa-style baths. Community perks include a saltwater pool with cabanas, fitness center, coworking spaces, pickleball court, dog park, fire pit, nature trail, and sky deck—all steps from shopping, dining, and Tampa International Airport
brand_voice: Being a new community, they are striving to create content that is consistent and aligned with their goals. Thoughtfully crafting a cohesive vision for their community and meticulously implementing it across every detail of the development, apartment homes, and resident events. Their commitment to fostering an active and cohesive community life sets them apart.
audience_type: Target demographic consists of three groups: 'ready to take off', 'moving up', and 'creating our life together'
music_notes: Being a new community, they are striving to create content that is consistent and aligned with their goals. Construction delays have prevented them from doing photoshoots or videos of future amenities. So they want to make good content with what they have.

overview_client_raw: Global Jet Sales is a premier private jet brokerage established in 1970, with over $7 billion in transactions and 50 years of experience. They deliver personalized aircraft sales, acquisition, and appraisal services, backed by a proprietary global database and expert advisors. With offices in Florida and Canada and strategic partnerships worldwide, they offer comprehensive, concierge-style support throughout every stage.
overview_polished: Global Jet Sales is a premier private jet brokerage established in 1970, with over $7 billion in transactions and 50 years of experience. They deliver personalized aircraft sales, acquisition, and appraisal services, backed by a proprietary global database and expert advisors. With offices in Florida and Canada and strategic partnerships worldwide, they offer comprehensive, concierge-style support throughout every stage.
audience_type: Ultra-High-Net-Worth Individuals, Business Owners & Executives, Younger First-Time Buyers, Repeat Jet Owners, & Family Offices & Wealth Advisors

overview_client_raw: NOVEL Beach Park is a luxury apartment community in Tampa, Florida, offering upscale studio to three-bedroom residences, many with views of Old Tampa Bay. Blending modern design with a beach-club vibe, the community features resort-style amenities like a saltwater pool, waterfront lounge, coworking space, fitness center, pet spa, and more. Located under a mile from top shopping and dining, it provides a vibrant, wellness-focused living experience.
overview_polished: NOVEL Beach Park is a luxury apartment community in Tampa, Florida, offering upscale studio to three-bedroom residences, many with views of Old Tampa Bay. Blending modern design with a beach-club vibe, the community features resort-style amenities like a saltwater pool, waterfront lounge, coworking space, fitness center, pet spa, and more. Located under a mile from top shopping and dining, it provides a vibrant, wellness-focused living experience.
brand_voice: High-class, high-touch luxury lifestyle focused on lifestyle experience beyond direct features and benefits. Content should embody what the life of a resident would look like -- their views throughout the community, what they're doing with their free time, what conveniences and benefits they can expect. Never refer to homes as 'units' (only apartments, apartment homes, residences, etc.). Never use 'apartment complex', but rather 'community'.
what_to_avoid: Never refer to homes as 'units' (only apartments, apartment homes, residences, etc.). Never use the term 'apartment complex', but rather 'community'.
audience_type: Renters who are looking to live in a sophisticated apartment community that provides residences will a full lifestyle experience while enjoying waterfront living.

overview_client_raw: At Mystic Powerboats we are the proud creators of the finest and fastest offshore boats in the world. Our powerboats balance speed and luxury and are fully customizable for your desires.
overview_polished: At Mystic Powerboats we are the proud creators of the finest and fastest offshore boats in the world. Our powerboats balance speed and luxury and are fully customizable for your desires.
music_notes: Mystic is a high-performance luxury brand. Music, videos, etc. should emulate this.

overview_client_raw: We develop, produce and distribute innovative products of excellent quality for a wide range of applications. Apart from use of our engines in our Group-owned trucks and buses, we also support our customers with a broad portfolio of engines for commercial vehicles, for power generation and cogeneration, as drives in agricultural machinery, rail, water and special-purpose vehicles, including individual and customized solutions.

With a seasoned team and a detailed six-step process, they craft high-quality, resilient homes tailored to Florida's coastal climate. From design to completion, Tide Homes emphasizes artistry, transparency, and on-time, on-budget delivery to turn each vision into a personalized forever home.

overview_client_raw: VIV is a modern luxury apartment development located in St. Petersburg's EDGE District. Built by Belpointe OZ, the project features two 15-story towers with 269 residential units ranging from studios to three bedrooms. The property includes a 355-space parking garage and about 15,000 square feet of ground-level retail space designed to add vibrancy to the district. VIV emphasizes upscale urban living with amenities such as a pool deck, fitness center, and resident lounge. Construction is nearly complete, with leasing expected to begin in late 2025. Positioned in one of St. Pete's fastest-growing neighborhoods, VIV reflects the city's shift toward walkable, mixed-use developments blending lifestyle, community, and modern design.

VIV emphasizes upscale urban living with amenities such as a pool deck, fitness center, and resident lounge. Construction is nearly complete, with leasing expected to begin in late 2025. Positioned in one of St. Pete's fastest-growing neighborhoods, VIV reflects the city's shift toward walkable, mixed-use developments blending lifestyle, community, and modern design.
audience_type: Families, million artsy + modern demographic, remote workers, values eccentric downtown experience but also the ability to recharge home owners, celebrities, bachelors

overview_client_raw: Galati Yacht Sales, founded in 1970 on Anna Maria Island, Florida, is a full-service yacht sales and brokerage firm representing top new-build and pre-owned brands such as Viking, Valhalla, Princess, Prestige, and Absolute. With 15 locations across the U.S., Mexico, and Costa Rica and four full-service yards, they provide sales, service, parts, and global brokerage support.

overview_client_raw: Discover a vibrant apartment community along Legacy Trail, where an active lifestyle meets a carefree way of living. With direct trail access, modern amenities, and hassle-free living, you can spend more time enjoying the outdoors, biking, running, or simply unwinding in a place designed for your best life.

overview_client_raw: Founded by the Payne brothers in St. Petersburg, Florida, crafts premium marine accessories rooted in decades of family manufacturing expertise. They specialize in handcrafted teak products—including custom yacht tables, rocket launchers, steps, pedestals, helm chair arms, and cup holders—engineered with high-gloss epoxy finishes for durability and elegance in harsh marine environments.

overview_client_raw: Bertram Yachts is an iconic American boatbuilder known for its relentless pursuit of performance, luxury, and craftsmanship. With a heritage that dates back to 1960, Bertram's DNA is rooted in sportfishing, yet its vessels exude comfort, durability, and prestige. Undergoing a modern renaissance, Bertram continues to serve discerning boaters who value stability, seaworthiness, and bold design — all proudly built in Tampa, FL.

audience_type: Upper Income

overview_client_raw: PKDG specializes in the design-build of distinctive, luxury custom residences. Led by the talents of architect, certified residential contractor, and licensed interior designer Phil Kean, PKDG offers award-winning architecture, construction, and interior design under one roof. This seamless design-build approach benefits clients by ensuring accuracy and consistency of vision throughout the construction process.
overview_polished: PKDG specializes in the design-build of distinctive, luxury custom residences. look_and_feel: Natural but vibrant and enhanced footage
audience_type: Families, million dollar home owners, celebrities, bachelors
music_notes: Natural but vibrant and enhanced footage. Viral and trendy content but elegant and tasteful. Creating FOMO with their designs and homes.

overview_client_raw: Founded in 1945 and based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Allied Marine is a global luxury yacht brokerage and dealer. They specialize in both new-yacht sales and pre-owned brokerage, representing elite Italian builders such as Ferretti Yachts, Pershing, Riva and Itama for the U.S. market. With over 40 brokers, six offices, and involvement in hundreds of superyacht transactions, they offer full-service yacht buying, selling, charter and management.

overview_client_raw: Northhaven is a brand-new, eco-certified luxury apartment community in Sanford, FL, offering one- to three-bedroom homes with designer Samsung kitchens, smart-home features, and private balconies. Residents enjoy resort-style amenities—including a saltwater pool, fitness center with Peloton bikes, co-working space, pet-friendly facilities—and nearby dining, shopping, and outdoor recreation just minutes from home.

audience_type: Young professionals & remote workers, Small families & couples, Pet owners, Lifestyle seekers/social renters, eco-conscious renters

overview_client_raw: Arcadia 331 is a new luxury apartment community in Freeport, Florida, minutes from Destin, 30A, and Santa Rosa Beach. It blends modern design with coastal calm, giving residents an elevated yet relaxed lifestyle close to the Gulf.

overview_client_raw: Modern Grounds is based out of the Tampa Bay area but is committed to making the entire state of Florida look like a green oasis. We've assembled the best & most committed team that takes pride in providing professional, quality work in a timely fashion. Our synthetic grass is environmentally friendly, realistic in appearance and incredibly low-maintenance. Whether you're interested in our grass for residential or commercial purposes, a local playground or a putting green, trust that you are in the best hands with Modern Grounds.
